CORN_HEALTHY.recommendation: Leaf appears healthy. Maintain balanced fertilization, proper spacing, and regular scouting to catch early symptoms.

CORN_LEAF_RUST.recommendation: Remove heavily infected leaves if practical, improve airflow, and consider a labeled fungicide if infection is spreading. Use resistant varieties for future planting.

PEPPER_BELL_HEALTHY.recommendation: Leaf appears healthy. Keep consistent watering, avoid wetting foliage, and monitor weekly for early signs of disease.

PEPPER_BELL_BACTERIAL_SPOT.recommendation: Avoid overhead watering, remove infected leaves, sanitize tools, and rotate crops. Use disease-free seeds/transplants and consider copper-based sprays if appropriate.

RICE_HEALTHY.recommendation: Leaf appears healthy. Maintain proper water management and balanced nutrients. Continue monitoring for early symptoms.

RICE_LEAF_BLAST.recommendation: Reduce excess nitrogen, improve field airflow where possible, and apply a labeled fungicide if outbreaks are severe. Use resistant varieties in future seasons.

RICE_LEAF_BLIGHT.recommendation: Use clean seed, avoid excessive nitrogen, maintain proper spacing, and manage irrigation to reduce spread. Consider resistant varieties for next planting.

RICE_LEAF_BROWN_SPOT.recommendation: Improve nutrition (especially potassium), avoid drought stress, and remove heavily infected debris. Use balanced fertilization and resistant varieties if available.
